---
title: "Data Analytics Dashboard"
date: 2026-04-20
tags: [data visualization, python, plotly, pandas]
link: "https://github.com/username/analytics-dashboard"
image: "https://via.placeholder.com/400x250?text=Analytics+Dashboard"
description: "Interactive dashboard for analyzing business metrics and KPIs. Built with Python and Plotly for real-time data visualization and insights."
---

## Project Overview

A comprehensive analytics dashboard providing real-time insights into business metrics, customer behavior, and performance indicators.

## Features

- **Real-time Metrics**: Live updating KPIs
- **Interactive Charts**: Zoom, filter, and drill-down capabilities
- **Custom Reports**: Generate and export reports
- **Data Integration**: Connect multiple data sources
- **Automated Alerts**: Get notified of important changes
- **Export Options**: Download as PDF, CSV, or Excel

## Technology Stack

- **Backend**: Python, Flask
- **Visualization**: Plotly, Pandas
- **Database**: PostgreSQL
- **Frontend**: React, D3.js

## Impact

- 📊 Tracks 50+ metrics
- 📈 Processes 1M+ data points daily
- 🚀 300% increase in decision-making speed
- 💰 $500k in cost savings identified

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/username/analytics-dashboard) | [Live Demo](#)
